menu.subtitle: Grow a ring of spinning blades, crush the horde, out-duel rival heroes.

gates.label: Collect swords
gates.text: Run gates — +N and ×N grow your ring

swords.label: Spin & slay
swords.text: Orbiting blades shred anything near you

rivals.label: Duel rivals
rivals.text: Out-number rival heroes, or get wiped
